description: Explicitly displaying individual item prices and per-person costs in food content captions to build trust and facilitate purchase decisions among Saudi consumers.
structural_recipe: Include specific SAR pricing for menu items or per-person costs directly in caption text. Format as: item name + 'بـ' + price in numerals (e.g., 'شوربة الدجاج بـ32'). Optionally add quality ratings in parentheses (e.g., '(6 من 10)') and location details. Structure with line breaks for readability of multiple price points.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value transparency and cost-consciousness, particularly around F&B experiences. Explicit pricing removes purchase friction, demonstrates fairness, and signals confidence in product value. Price disclosure directly addresses key decision factors for restaurant/café selection and builds credibility through openness.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be current and accurate to avoid credibility damage—outdated prices create negative experiences
Price sensitivity varies by venue type; luxury establishments may find explicit pricing less aligned with brand positioning
Regional price variations across Saudi regions may require localization
Dynamic pricing or promotional periods may make static captions obsolete quickly
cultural_constraints: Riba/interest concerns: avoid framing as financing options without explicit halal compliance
Ramadan timing: price points during Ramadan buffets treated differently than regular pricing
